meta.purpose: Complete structured JSON prompt for building the /trade-in page as a static Astro page. Every field contains real production copy — no placeholders.

constraints.framework: Astro — static HTML only, zero client-side JavaScript
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS with semantic design tokens from the project design system
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library imports
constraints.images: Use with loading='lazy', explicit width/height, descriptive alt text
constraints.interactivity: Use native <details>/<summary> for FAQ accordion — no JS
constraints.seo: Single <h1>, canonical URL, JSON-LD (BreadcrumbList, FAQPage), meta robots index/follow

seo.titleTag: Sell Your Phone Winnipeg | Get Cash for Used Devices | Mobile Tech Lab
seo.metaDescription: Sell your used phone, tablet, or laptop in Winnipeg. Get cash or store credit same-day. Price match guarantee. Free shipping on mail-ins. Working or damaged devices accepted.

mainEntity.name: Should I repair or sell my phone?

acceptedAnswer.text: It depends on the damage, device age, and current part costs. Minor issues like cracked screens are often worth repairing—compare repair vs. sell to see what makes sense. Our offers are based on current replacement part prices, so you'll always get a fair deal either way.

mainEntity.name: Can you recover data from my phone before I sell it?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes! We offer Data Recovery & Transfer services for phones, tablets, and laptops. Bundle it with your trade-in for a discount. We'll transfer your photos, contacts, and files to a USB drive or cloud backup before processing your device.

mainEntity.name: Why won't you buy locked phones?

acceptedAnswer.text: iCloud-locked or Google FRP-locked devices can't be resold or refurbished legally. We need devices that you can sign out of and unlock before selling. Our payouts are based on current part costs—if parts get cheaper, your payout goes up.

mainEntity.name: How do I ship my phone to sell?

acceptedAnswer.text: After accepting your quote, we'll send you a free prepaid shipping label with tracking. Pack your device securely (we recommend bubble wrap or the original box) and drop it off at any Canada Post location. Our offers reflect real-time part pricing, so you'll get a fair value.

mainEntity.name: How fast do I get cash for my phone?

acceptedAnswer.text: Drop off in Winnipeg and get paid same-day via cash or E-Transfer. Mail-in devices are processed and paid within 24-48 hours of inspection. Payouts are based on current part costs—we adjust fairly as market prices change.

mainEntity.name: Do I need to erase my phone before selling?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can, but you don't have to. Our team securely wipes or destroys all data from every device during intake. Either way, your personal information is fully protected before we refurbish or recycle the device.

mainEntity.name: How do I sell my phone in Winnipeg?

acceptedAnswer.text: Submit your device details through our quote form or drop by our Winnipeg location. We'll assess your phone and provide a cash offer based on the model, condition, and current part costs.

mainEntity.name: Can I get cash for my used phone?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes! In-store drop-offs receive same-day cash or E-Transfer. You can also use your payout as store credit toward repairs or a pre-owned device. Our offers are based on real replacement part prices and may change over time.

section_1_hero.instructions: Full-width gradient hero section. Single <h1>. Two CTA buttons. Decorative blurred background circles.
section_1_hero.headline: Sell Your Phone for Cash Near You in Winnipeg — Get Paid Today
section_1_hero.subheadline: Get top dollar for used, broken or unwanted devices with fast quotes, price match guarantee, and same-day payout.
section_1_hero.bodyParagraph: We buy iPhones, Androids, iPads, MacBooks and more—even with cracked screens or water damage. Our offers are based on real part costs: if parts get cheaper, your payout goes up, and if they rise, we adjust honestly.

section_2_how_it_works.instructions: 4-step process grid. Each step has a numbered badge ('Step N'), icon, title, and description. Cards have hover border and shadow effects. Followed by a 'repair vs sell' comparison link below the grid.
section_2_how_it_works.sectionSubheading: Selling your device is quick and easy—just four simple steps.

steps.title: Get a Quote
steps.description: Tell us your device's make, model & condition. We send a cash offer right away.

steps.title: Drop Off or Ship
steps.description: Bring it to our Winnipeg shop or mail it in with free, trackable shipping.

steps.title: We Inspect & Confirm
steps.description: Our techs verify the device and confirm your payout. If our part cost drops, your payout increases; if parts get more expensive, we adjust fairly.

steps.title: Get Paid Fast
steps.description: Choose cash, e-transfer or store credit and get paid the same day.

section_3_device_categories.instructions: 5 device category cards in a responsive grid (1-col mobile, 2-col md, 3-col lg). Each card has an icon, title, description, model pills/chips, a primary 'Get Cash Quote' button (external link opening in new tab), and a secondary 'get repair instead' internal link. Section has id='quote-form' for anchor linking.
section_3_device_categories.sectionSubheading: We buy a wide range of used devices in any condition—working, cracked, or damaged.

categories.title: Sell iPhone & Android Phones
categories.description: We buy working or broken phones—cracked screens, battery issues, water damage. We securely wipe all data before processing.

categories.title: Sell iPad & Tablets
categories.description: Sell your tablet in any condition. We handle data wiping and accept devices with damaged screens or batteries.

categories.title: Sell MacBook & Laptops
categories.description: Get cash for your laptop—even older models have value. We securely erase all personal data during intake.

categories.title: Sell Game Consoles & Games
categories.description: Sell PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo Switch, Steam Deck, and game discs. Working or with issues.

categories.title: Sell Apple Watch & Wearables
categories.description: Sell your smartwatch or fitness tracker. We buy devices in any cosmetic or functional condition.

section_4_why_trade_in.instructions: 4-column grid of advantage cards (1-col mobile, 2-col md, 4-col lg). Each card has a circular icon container, title, and description. One description contains an internal link to /contact. Cards have hover border and shadow effects.
section_4_why_trade_in.sectionHeading: Why Sell to Mobile Tech Lab?
section_4_why_trade_in.sectionSubheading: Get more cash for your used devices with our straightforward sell program.

advantages.title: Competitive Pricing
advantages.description: We use real-time part pricing to keep our offers fair. If a competitor publishes a higher payout, show us and we'll do our best to match it.

advantages.title: Fast Payment
advantages.description: Cash, e-transfer or store credit—paid on the same day we receive your device.

advantages.title: Free Shipping & Drop-Off
advantages.description: Mail it in on us or stop by our convenient Winnipeg locations.

advantages.title: Eco-Friendly Upcycling
advantages.description: Broken tech still has value. We refurbish or responsibly recycle every device to reduce e-waste.

section_5_case_study.instructions: Real customer case study section with a badge ('Real Customer Story'), headline, description paragraph, before/after image cards with overlay badges and captions, a context line below images, a 4-step 'Why This Still Had Value' process grid with numbered circles and icons, and a CTA card at the bottom. Background: muted/30.
section_5_case_study.sectionHeading: We Bought This Broken iPhone — Yours Might Be Worth Something Too
section_5_case_study.sectionSubheading: This iPhone XR came to us completely bent and shattered—front and back. The customer just wanted their photos and contacts recovered, not a full repair. Here's how we helped.

before.alt: Severely bent and shattered iPhone XR on Mobile Tech Lab's glass display counter
before.caption: Device arrived with a completely bent frame and shattered display — seemed beyond repair.

after.alt: Same iPhone XR with temporary screen installed on workbench, powered on after successful data recovery
after.caption: Temporary screen installed, device powered on, and all data successfully backed up at our workstation.

section_5_case_study.payoutContextLine: Customer received a same-day payout after data recovery—even in this condition.

processSteps.title: Checked What We Were Working With
processSteps.description: We looked at the bent frame and smashed screen to see if the data inside could still be saved.

processSteps.title: We Found a Way to Access the Data
processSteps.description: Using a temporary screen, we powered the phone back on and got into it — no full repair needed.

processSteps.title: Saved All Their Stuff
processSteps.description: Photos, contacts, and files were all backed up safely before anything else happened.

processSteps.title: Paid Out & Recycled
processSteps.description: The customer got paid same-day, and we responsibly recycled the leftover parts.

cta.heading: Think your phone is worthless? It probably isn't.
cta.body: You might be surprised. Get a free quote and find out what your device is worth.

section_6_requirements.instructions: Section opens with a reassurance line above the heading. Two-column grid: accepted (green border/bg) and not-accepted (red border/bg) requirement lists using check/x circle icons. Followed by two callout cards stacked vertically: data safety card (primary color with bullet list) and data recovery upsell card (amber accent with CTA button). Background: muted/30.
section_6_requirements.reassuranceLine: Not sure if your device qualifies? We'll tell you in seconds — no commitment required.
section_6_requirements.sectionSubheading: Before selling your device, please review what we can and cannot buy.

accepted.heading: Accepted
items: We accept fully paid, unlocked devices (working or broken)
All personal data removed (we can assist) — Need help removing your data? We can assist.

notAccepted.heading: Devices We Can't Purchase
items: Devices must be fully paid and not blacklisted, stolen, or financed
Devices must be unlocked (no iCloud lock)
Severely water-damaged devices may be eligible for recycling instead of payout

dataSafetyCard.heading: Your Data is 100% Safe
items: We can handle it for you

dataRecoveryUpsellCard.heading: Need Your Data First?
dataRecoveryUpsellCard.body: Selling a phone with photos, contacts, or files you haven't backed up? We offer Data Recovery & Transfer services—bundle it with your trade-in for a discount.

section_7_b2b_callout.instructions: Single horizontal card with building icon, text content, two feature badges with icons, and a CTA button linking to /business#trade-in. Gradient background.
section_7_b2b_callout.heading: Fleet & Business Trade-Ins
section_7_b2b_callout.body: Upgrading a fleet of devices? We offer bulk device buyback for schools, businesses, and IT departments with competitive pricing, scheduled pick-up, and dedicated corporate accounts.

section_8_locations.instructions: This section is identical across all pages. Use the exact data below — do not change any copy, hours, phone numbers, or addresses. Render as cards with map/directions links.
section_8_locations.sectionHeading: Device Repair Locations in Winnipeg & Manitoba
section_8_locations.sectionSubheading: Two convenient locations to serve you. Walk-ins welcome or book your appointment online.
section_8_locations.serviceAreaNote: Drop off your trade-in at our Winnipeg location for same-day quotes and payment.

locations.name: Thompson Location
locations.address: 300 Mystery Lake Rd #1530, Thompson, MB R8N 0M2

section_9_faq.instructions: Render all 8 FAQ items as a native <details>/<summary> accordion — no JavaScript. Also inject the faqSchema JSON-LD from the seo block into a <script type='application/ld+json'> tag. Answers may contain inline HTML links — render them as real <a> tags with appropriate attributes.

section_10_sticky_cta.instructions: Fixed bottom bar visible only on mobile (hidden on md+ screens). Two buttons side-by-side: Call and Text. Uses backdrop blur for readability over content.
section_10_sticky_cta.visibility: mobile-only (hidden on md breakpoint and above)
